2606.00647.title: LinguIUTics at PsyDefDetect: Iterative Imbalance-Aware Fine-tuning of Qwen3-8B for Psychological Defense Mechanism Classification
2606.00647.paper_summary: Detecting psychological defense mechanisms in conversational text remains a challenging clinical NLP problem. For the PsyDefDetect 2026 shared task (nine-class utterance classification evaluated via macro F1), our team LinguIUTics achieves a macro F1-score of 0.3917 on the official positive-class leaderboard, ranking 4th out of 21 registered teams and improving over the Ministral-8B task baseline (31.48 macro F1) by 7.7 absolute points (24.4 percent relative). BERT-family encoders and zero-shot LLMs proved ineffective on rare classes due to severe class imbalance, leading us to QLoRA fine-tuning of Qwen3-8B. We leverage three key strategies: grouped stratified cross-validation (preventing leakage), minority-class round-robin lexical augmentation, and a post-processing pipeline with logit bias tuning and ensemble blending. Together, these components close much of the validation-to-leaderboard gap and substantially improve minority-class recall, driving the critical "Unclear" class (Level 8) from near-zero performance to an F1 score of 0.797.
2606.00647.paper_summary_zh: 偵測對話文本中的心理防衛機制仍然是一個具有挑戰性的臨床自然語言處理問題。對於PsyDefDetect 2026共享任務（通過宏觀F1評估的九類話語分類），我們的團隊LinguIUTics在官方正類排行榜上達到了0.3917的宏觀F1分數，排名21支註冊隊伍中的第4位，並將Ministral-8B任務基線（31.48宏觀F1）提高了7.7個絕對點（相對提高24.4%）。由於嚴重的類別不平衡，BERT家族編碼器和零樣本大型語言模型在稀有類別上表現不佳，這使我們轉向對Qwen3-8B進行QLoRA微調。我們利用了三個關鍵策略：分組分層交叉驗證（防止洩漏）、少數類別循環增強，以及帶有邏輯偏差調整和集成混合的後處理管道。這些組件共同縮小了驗證到排行榜的差距，並顯著提高了少數類別的召回率，將關鍵的“模糊”類別（等級8）的表現從接近零提升至F1分數0.797。
2606.00647.author: Shefayat E Shams Adib et.al.
2606.00647.authors: Shefayat E Shams Adib, Ahmed Alfey Sani, Md Hasibur Rahman Alif, Ajwad Abrar
